title: TISS Lead Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) Lead Notification 2026 has been released on 29-05-2026 on the official website of TISS. Has been announced through the TISS Lead Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Minimum 5 years of experience in non-profit fundraising and communications with experience of engaging and networking with donors and CSR community, Knowledge and experience of donor communication, event planning and management, Ability for developing funder-driven MIS, Excellent communication and storytelling skills with enthusiasm for building an organization's digital voice and presence
qualification.details: Minimum 5 years of experience in non-profit fundraising and communications. Experience of engaging and networking with donors and the CSR community. Knowledge and experience of donor communication, event planning, and management. Ability for developing funder-driven MIS. Excellent communication and storytelling skills with enthusiasm for building an organization's digital voice and presence.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TISS Lead Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TISS Lead - Fund Raising recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the TISS Lead - Fund Raising position is 15th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Lead - Fund Raising role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 80,000 per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the essential qualifications for the Lead - Fund Raising position?
faq.answer: Candidates need a minimum of 5 years of experience in non-profit fundraising and communications, along with strong networking and donor engagement skills.

faq.question: Q4. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the TISS Lead - Fund Raising recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official TISS website.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. Does TISS provide any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits or relaxation details for this post.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
